test.details: All tests passed with race detection enabled

lint.details: 88 dupl warnings (pre-existing), 18 staticcheck suggestions. These are not blocking issues - dupl is acceptable for this codebase size and staticcheck suggestions are style-only.

rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate code is expected and acceptable in a project of this size; refactoring would risk introducing bugs
style-only suggestions that don't affect correctness; can be addressed in future refactoring

featureDetails.summary: Import order in main.go correctly reorganized to follow CLAUDE.md pattern (stdlib → third-party → internal with blank line separators)
9 magic numbers in main.go replaced with named constants from constants/ package. All constants follow PascalCase naming and are logically grouped.
